story Print Notes / Key/Value Store on Terra and Swarmnuc2008 On terra.eecs.berkeley.edu, we are running the $PTII/ptolemy/actor/lib/jjs/modules/httpServer/demo/KeyValueStoreClient/KeyValueStoreServerTerra.xml model. We have a similar setup running o

Terra.xml model. We have a similar setup running on swarmnuc2008.eecs.berkeley.edu , see $PTII/org/terraswarm/accessor/demo/AugmentedRealityVideoSOHO/README.txt On terra.eecs.berkeley.edu, the way the model gets started is by using pm2 in the sbuser

model gets started is by using pm2 in the sbuser account. On terra, ~sbuser/runKVStore contains #!/bin/sh # pm2 start --interpreter=bash ~/runKVStore $PTII / bin / ptinvoke ptolemy.moml.MoMLSimpleApplication $PTII / ptolemy / actor / lib / jjs / mo

plication $PTII / ptolemy / actor / lib / jjs / modules / httpServer / demo / KeyValueStoreClient / KeyValueStoreServerTerra.xml [$[Get Code]] On swarmnuc2008, ~sbuser/runKVStore contains: #!/bin/sh # pm2 start --interpreter=bash ~/runKVStore $PTII

pm2 start --interpreter=bash ~/runKVStore $PTII / bin / ptinvoke ptolemy.moml.MoMLSimpleApplication $PTII / org / terraswarm / accessor / demo / AugmentedRealityVideoSOHO / KeyValueStoreServerSOHO.xml [$[Get Code]] PM2 Installation Instructions As

ml [$[Get Code]] PM2 Installation Instructions As the sbuser, install pm2 cd mkdir node_modules npm install pm2 export PATH =~ / node_modules / bin: ${PATH} [$[Get Code]] You may want to add the export line to sbuser's ~/.bashrc . As root, run the co

t line to sbuser's ~/.bashrc . As root, run the command below to set up pm2 to start up on reboot export PATH = / home / sbuser / src / ptII / bin: ${PATH} export PTII = / home / sbuser / src / ptII ~sbuser / node_modules / .bin / pm2 startup [$[Get

sbuser / node_modules / .bin / pm2 startup [$[Get Code]] As sbuser, create the ~sbuser/runKVStore file (see above for the contents) and make it executable: chmod a+x ~ / runKVStore [$[Get Code]] As sbuser, create ~sbuser/sbuser.cron (see above). As s

user, create ~sbuser/sbuser.cron (see above). As sbuser, have pm2 start up our script: pm2 start --interpreter = bash ~ / runKVStore [$[Get Code]] As sbuser, run the startup command to register the sbuser account: sbuser @ swarmnuc2008:~ / .pm2 / log

user account: sbuser @ swarmnuc2008:~ / .pm2 / logs$ pm2 startup / home / sbuser / src / ptII / bin / node: Running / usr / bin / node / home / sbuser / node_modules / .bin / pm2 startup [ PM2 ] Init System found: systemd [ PM2 ] To setup the Startup

System found: systemd [ PM2 ] To setup the Startup Script, copy / paste the following command: sudo env PATH = $PATH : / usr / bin / home / sbuser / node_modules / pm2 / bin / pm2 startup systemd -u sbuser --hp / home / sbuser [$[Get Code]] It might

buser --hp / home / sbuser [$[Get Code]] It might not be necessary to run the above command, but it probably does not hurt. As root, run the setup command: sudo env PATH = $PATH : / usr / bin / home / sbuser / node_modules / pm2 / bin / pm2 startup s

sbuser / node_modules / pm2 / bin / pm2 startup systemd -u sbuser --hp / home / sbuser [$[Get Code]] As sbuser, save the current setup: sbuser @ swarmnuc2008:~ / .pm2 / logs$ pm2 save / home / sbuser / src / ptII / bin / node: Running / usr / bin /

/ src / ptII / bin / node: Running / usr / bin / node / home / sbuser / node_modules / .bin / pm2 save [ PM2 ] Saving current process list... [ PM2 ] Successfully saved in / home / sbuser / .pm2 / dump.pm2 sbuser @ swarmnuc2008:~ / .pm2 / logs$ [$[G

mp.pm2 sbuser @ swarmnuc2008:~ / .pm2 / logs$ [$[Get Code]] Firewall The port is currently 8099. To change the port edit the model and then update the firewall. See https://www.terraswarm.org/swarmos/wiki/Main/TerraAndTerraTest#toc13 Restarting We

s/wiki/Main/TerraAndTerraTest#toc13 Restarting We restart the model every day so as to avoid memory leaks and other failures ~sbuser/sbuser.cron contains: 1 5 * * * cxh -c '/home/sbuser/cg/node_modules/.bin/pm2 restart runKVStore' >& / home / sbuser
